title: cryptocoryne ciliata var. ciliata
intro: Cryptocoryne ciliata var. ciliata, commonly known as the 'Ciliate Crypt', is a species of aquatic plant in the family Arum. It is native to Sri Lanka and is valued for its ornamental and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in water, and have been reported to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing.
